description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, yet spacious, wallet from belmonte. While it's well organised to allow you to carry all your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit.Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmMade of genuine leather for durabilityTwo main compartments with textile liningSix card slots on the left side of the wallet with an inner see through card holder and a press buttoned flapThree insert pockets on with a press buttoned pocket for coinsBranding embossed on the frontCareWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
